title: Two-way integration with Constant Contact

posts.author: kpmd (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are trying to use our Monday CRM to connect with Constant Contact in a meaningful way. Features that would help:

  • Two-way integration so updates made in CC translate to Monday CRM and vice versa.
  • Larger item limit in boards - we’ve had to split our subscribers over multiple boards which isn’t ideal.

posts.author: Jadi (Alpa Rana)
posts.cookedHtml: I need monday’s data to update constant contact data since constant contact is used as the mass email service.

posts.author: Asvitek (Audra Hendrix)
posts.cookedHtml: I am gobsmacked at the lack of integration with Constant Contact since it has been around for so long and is SO much better than MailChimp.

posts.author: Karmela (Lejarde)
posts.cookedHtml: THIS! Any updates on this feature request? We are starting to use monday.com as our CRM but will continue to use Constant Contact as our mass email app. We need data in Monday to populate into Constant Contact so we are not entering the data twice–once in monday and once in CC. Help!

posts.author: Karmela (Lejarde)
posts.cookedHtml: Any new developments on this feature request?

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml: hey Karmela this is a very specific/niche feature so I don’t think monday can add that anytime soon. If you want that kind custom integration you have to through 3rd party developers

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi I am creating a custom integration for constantContact, if you need access let me know. I gonna add many more, this will makes a life a lot easier.
